goal: Add 4 new GL event handlers to FinancialEventListener with full test coverage

tasks.name: Add GL handlers for LoanReversalEvent and ContributionReversedEvent
tasks.action: Add handleLoanReversal (DR Loan Receivable 1002 + DR Interest Receivable 1003 + CR Cash 1001, with optional DR Member Account 2002 for penalty) and handleContributionReversed (DR Member Shares 2001 + CR Cash 1001) handlers with BEFORE_COMMIT phase.

tasks.name: Add GL handlers for PenaltyWaivedEvent and BenefitsDistributedEvent
tasks.action: Add ACCOUNT_BAD_DEBT_EXPENSE constant (5003). Add handlePenaltyWaived (DR Bad Debt Expense 5003 + CR Member Account 2002) and handleBenefitsDistributed (DR Interest Income 4001 + CR Member Account 2002) handlers with BEFORE_COMMIT phase.

tasks.name: Add tests for all 4 new GL handlers
tasks.action: Add 4 @Nested test classes: HandleLoanReversalTests, HandleContributionReversedTests, HandlePenaltyWaivedTests, HandleBenefitsDistributedTests. Follow existing test patterns with balanced entry verification and account assertions.

commitMessage: feat(event-gl-completeness): add GL handlers for reversals, waivers, and benefits
